blended.narrative: Crabbe Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 54°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 51°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 49°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
